mapper.select: SELECT id, day_entry_id, image_url, thumb_url, fit, sort_order, created_at FROM day_image WHERE day_entry_id = #{dayEntryId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO day_image (day_entry_id, image_url, thumb_url, fit, sort_order) VALUES (#{dayEntryId}, #{imageUrl}, #{thumbUrl}, #{fit}, #{sortOrder})
